nodes.name: Telegram Bot Webhook
nodes.notes: Set this as the Telegram webhook URL: POST https://api.telegram.org/bot{TOKEN}/setWebhook?url=https://n8n.pagefairy.com/webhook/pagefairy-bot

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { telegram_chat_id: $('Parse Update').first().json.chat_id, first_name: $('Parse Update').first().json.first_name, bot_state: 'new' } }) }}

parameters.text:
=Hey {{$('Parse Update').first().json.first_name}}! 👋

I'm PageFairy — your secret weapon for selling lash products without buying inventory first.

💡 Here's the magic: You pick a product, set YOUR price, share with clients, and we ship directly to them. You pocket the profit.

No upfront cost. No risk. Just sales.

📊 *Quick Example:*

Mink Lash Set
• Our price: $12
• You sell at: $28
• You keep: $16 profit

Sell 20 sets = $320 in your pocket

And you never touch the product! ✨
Ready to see what you could sell?

Before we get started — let's claim your link! 🔗

What's your brand name?
(This becomes pagefairy.me/_____)

Type it now (letters and numbers only, no spaces):
={{$json.message}}

Before we get started — let's claim your link! 🔗

What's your brand name?
(This becomes pagefairy.me/_____)

Type it now (letters and numbers only, no spaces):

That name doesn't work. Please use only letters and numbers (3–32 characters, no spaces).

Try again:
That name is taken! Try another:

=✅ *Your page is live!*

🔗 pagefairy.me/{{$('Validate Username').first().json.username}}

Add this to your Instagram bio — it updates automatically when you launch a campaign.

Now let's find your first product!

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { status: 'active', admin_approved_by: String($('Parse Callback Data').first().json.chat_id), admin_approved_at: new Date().toISOString() } }) }}

parameters.text:
=🎉 *Campaign Approved!*

Your campaign is LIVE:
🔗 pagefairy.me/{{$('Fetch Tech User for Approval').first().json.fields.username}}

Share this link with your clients to start collecting pre-orders!
We need a little more detail to get this right. Please update here: [Link]

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { actor: 'onboarding_bot', action: 'user_flagged', target_type: 'users', target_id: $('Fetch Tech User for Approval').first().json.id, details: JSON.stringify({ reason: 'second_rejection', campaign_id: $('Parse Callback Data').first().json.campaign_id }) } }) }}

parameters.text: You have reached today's limit. Upgrade to Magic Wand+ for priority access.

nodes.name: Send Rate Limit Message
nodes.notes: Triggered when USERS.submission_count_24h >= 2 AND USERS.magic_wand_active = false. Exact copy from pf-ops.txt.

parameters.text: This drop is sold out. Type NOTIFY to join the waitlist.

nodes.name: Send Sold Out Message
nodes.notes: Triggered when user selects a product with SKUS.stock_status = Sold_Out. Exact copy from pf-ops.txt.

parameters.text: That link has expired. Type REJOIN to request a new one.

nodes.name: Send Expired Link Message
nodes.notes: Triggered when user taps an expired Vendor Lounge invite link. Exact copy from pf-ops.txt.

parameters.text: Referral not eligible — self-referrals don't count.

nodes.name: Send Self-Referral Message
nodes.notes: Triggered when /start?ref=X resolves to the same user as the referrer. Exact copy from pf-ops.txt.

parameters.text: Request received — review takes up to 48 hours. We'll notify you here when it's approved.

nodes.name: Send Cash-Out Received Message
nodes.notes: Triggered when user requests Fairy Points cash-out (2,500 pts = $25). Exact copy from pf-ops.txt.

parameters.text: Please use plain text only — no links or hashtags.

nodes.name: Send Bio Sanitize Error
nodes.notes: Triggered when bio text fails sanitization (contains URLs, >2 hashtags, or injection patterns). Exact copy from pf-ops.txt.

parameters.text: What would you like to do?
={{$json.message}}

*PageFairy Commands:*

/start - Start over
/menu - Main menu
/products - Browse catalog
/mycampaigns - Your campaigns
/help - This list

💡 *Pro tip:* Send me a product photo and I'll write campaign copy for you!

*How PageFairy Works:*

1️⃣ *PICK* a product from our catalog
→ We have lashes, tools, accessories

2️⃣ *SET* your price
→ Buy at $12, sell at $28 = $16 profit

3️⃣ *SHARE* your campaign link
→ Post on IG, send to clients

4️⃣ *COLLECT* pre-orders
→ Clients pay you directly

5️⃣ *WE SHIP* to your clients
→ You never touch inventory

💰 You keep the profit margin on every sale!

Let's start a new campaign! First, pick a product:

Use /products to browse the catalog, then tap "Select" on the product you want.

I'm your AI assistant! 🤖

I can help you with:
• Writing campaign descriptions
• Answering questions about PageFairy
• Analyzing product photos
• Marketing tips

Just type your question or send a product photo!
={{$json.message}}
={{$json.message}}
